confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_896cbd3a-091b-4597-becb-3dea6fa237c1 read back as received

evidence: The need emerged naturally from Canonical Inbox work, human file-drop intake, Site-to-Site proposals, Staccato mailbox sync, and repeated friction around whether a message was actually delivered, merely recorded, pending, or addressed to the wrong authority. Incoming intent now has a canonical envelope model; outgoing effects need the same discipline before execution becomes ambiguous or unsafe.
proposal: Introduce Canonical Outbox as a first-class construct. An outbox item should be inert until execution, carry target locus/recipient, transport, payload, authority, approval requirement, dry-run rendering, execution status, delivery confirmation, retry/supersession data, and evidence of the external effect. Supported target kinds should include site_inbox, email, github_issue, github_pr_comment, filesystem_drop, human_notification, webhook, chat, and publication. The model should separate compose, validate, approve, execute, confirm, retry, supersede, and archive.
payload.recommendation: Treat this as important for immediate execution. Start with the smallest coherent vertical: Site-to-Site and filesystem-drop delivery, because they avoid external credentials while exercising the full authority model. Then add email/GitHub transports behind the same outbox lifecycle. Provide CLI surfaces such as outbox compose, outbox preview, outbox approve, outbox send, outbox confirm, and outbox work-next, with Git-visible outbox envelope artifacts analogous to inbox-envelopes.
payload.summary: Narada needs a Canonical Outbox as an immediate execution priority. It should not be merely an outgoing-message folder or a mirror of the Inbox. It should be the canonical queue of governed outbound effects: intent to send, publish, notify, hand off, propose to another Site, create external issue/comment, write a filesystem drop, call a webhook, or otherwise cross from Narada into another locus or transport.
payload.title: Canonical Outbox should govern outbound effects across transports
